ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene function */,
  "gene_sequence" TEXT /* DNA sequence of the gene */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the gene is derived */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome number where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* The strand of the DNA (positive or negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protocol used for the experiment */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab where the experiment was conducted */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this experiment is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition set */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this condition belongs to */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment applied (e.g., Control, Chemical, Heat) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the experiment was conducted */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the treatment */,
  "replicate" INTEGER /* Number of replicates for the condition */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the treatment */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level during the experiment */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level during the experiment */,
  "light_conditions" TEXT /* Light conditions during the experiment (e.g., continuous light, dark) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition this result pertains to */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being measured */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Measured expression level of the gene */,
  "replicate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the replicate this result pertains to */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the expression level */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the expression level */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the expression level */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the expression level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
